rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings and assignments.
Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting annex blocks at appropriate component or implementation levels.
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for dependency guarantees.
Do not include implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation contracts use assign for binding outputs to expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; keep them in type scope for deterministic dependencies.
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE contract syntax and validation rules
